display.purpose: Page titles only. One per view.

body.purpose: Default UI copy at 13px compact tooling density.

label.purpose: Field labels, unit captions, error text.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default card containers and active toggle segments.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions for hover and color changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA for join and confirm actions (cursor.com landing pill).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>Join leaderboard</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: "Cursor Gothic", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #14120b; background: #f7f7f4; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5da1e5 30%, transparent); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: "Cursor Gothic", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 6%, transparent); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5da1e5 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 12%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 12%, transparent); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 70%, transparent); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #5da1e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5da1e5 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Toggle Group
components.description: Metric and scope filter segmented control.
components.css: .ds-toggle-group { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 2px; background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 8%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 10%, transparent); border-radius: 8px; } .ds-toggle-item { height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 70%, transparent); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-toggle-item:hover { color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); } .ds-toggle-item-active { color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); background: #1c1914; box-shadow: 0 0 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 6px 16px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4); } .ds-toggle-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5da1e5 30%, transparent); }

components.name: Leaderboard Card
components.html:
1W
William Morales 🇸🇻
@wmoralesdev · 42 agents
128
agents
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1c1914; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 10%, transparent); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 6px 16px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4); overflow: hidden; font-family: "Cursor Gothic", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-card-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-card-row:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 6%, transparent); } .ds-rank { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-rank-1 { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 16%, transparent); color: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 80%, #f7f7f4); } .ds-rank-2 { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 12%, transparent); color: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 65%, #f7f7f4); } .ds-rank-3 { background: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 8%, transparent); color: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 50%, #f7f7f4); } .ds-avatar { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 12%, transparent); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-row-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-row-handle { font-size: 11px; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 70%, transparent); } .ds-row-stat { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-unit { font-size: 10px; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Ambassador Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #f54e00; background: color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 12%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #f54e00 42%, transparent); border-radius: 6px; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Sticky top bar with brand mark and join CTA.
components.html: Cursor Leaderboard
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; background: color-mix(in oklab, #14120b 80%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 10%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); font-family: "Cursor Gothic", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklab, #f7f7f4 94%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: This system extends cursor.com landing chrome into a community leaderboard: warm #14120B background, luminous gray type, white pill primary actions. Density is compact (13px body, tight vertical rhythm) because users scan lists quickly and share screenshots. The aesthetic is restrained competition, not gamification theater.
keyCharacteristics: White pill primary actions; brand orange rarely if at all
Compact tooling typography at 13px base with semibold headlines
List-first layout: ranked rows, not card grids
Share-ready rank moments with clear numerals and country context

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Brand orange does not appear on primary CTAs or rank badges. White pill actions and neutral ranks carry hierarchy. Orange is limited to optional logo-adjacent marks.

rules.name: The No-Neon Rule
rules.body: No purple gradients, no glow effects, no saturated secondary accents competing with orange. If a color reads as gaming or crypto, remove it.

rules.name: The Compact Base Rule
rules.body: Body text defaults to 13px. Do not inflate to 16px for readability; this is a tool surface, not a marketing page.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest are flat tonal panels. Shadows appear on elevated overlays (dialog, active toggle) or card containers, never on every list row.

dos: Do use white pill primary buttons (#f7f7f4 on #14120b) for join and confirm actions.
Do keep the warm dark chrome (#14120B / #1C1914) as the canonical theme.
Do show rank as a numeral in a small badge; color supports but never replaces the number.
Do use compact 13px body type and tight list rows for scannable rankings.
Do design join-success and rank displays for screenshot sharing (country flag, clear #rank).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on dialog and hover transitions.
donts: Don't use crypto and gaming leaderboard aesthetics: neon glows, dark purple gradients, over-the-top rank badges, particle effects, LEVEL UP energy.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard slop: hero metric blocks, identical card grids, gradient text, glassmorphism chrome.
Don't add aggressive gamification: XP bars, loot-box metaphors, streak flames, shouty CTAs.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for emphasis; use weight and size.
Don't add colored side-stripe borders on list items or cards.
Don't rely on color alone for rank meaning; always show the numeric rank.
Don't inflate typography to marketing-page sizes; this is a native tool surface.
